decision.evidence: Local full-suite and four-shard wall-clock measurement at 544 manifest cases after the Starlark/Rego/GPU/WebIDL/AssemblyScript batch (1 warmup + 5 timed runs, nearest-rank p95, 2026-07-14): full suite = 62.41 s; shard 0 = 17.11 s, shard 1 = 21.76 s, shard 2 = 8.57 s, shard 3 = 13.88 s. The full suite exceeds the 60 s trigger and every selected shard remains within the 45 s target.
